name: @5dive/openagent
description: CLI for the OpenAgent persona spec (v0.2) — validate a persona, render a rarity-tiered trading card (static or animated), compute its tier, speak it via TTS, emit a Flow/Veo scene prompt, sign + verify per-file provenance and remix lineage, verify did:web org affiliation (verified ORG badge), verify the signed Mythical registry, and run an end-to-end `doctor` pre-flight before sharing.
